Interface IXmlPropertySet

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that manage metadata.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("121BD4BC-2508-11D3-A641-0008C7D3AE50")]
public interface IXmlPropertySet

SaveAsFile(string, string, bool, ref string)

Transforms the metadata using an XSL stylesheet if specified, writes out the header if specified, and saves it in a file.

void SaveAsFile(string xslPath, string header, bool outputANSI, ref string outPath)

xslPath string
header string
outputANSI bool
outPath string
